dbbot v0.0.1-beta.4 keeps the managed release asset name versioned while simplifying the extracted directory name inside the tarball.

The release package is still published as dbbot-v0.0.1-beta.4.tar.gz, but extracting it now produces a stable top-level dbbot directory instead of a version-specific directory name.

This keeps command examples and local usage paths simpler while preserving the exact package version through the asset filename and the VERSION file shipped inside the package.
